channel.title: Dropout.tv - Parlor Room
channel.description: Latest releases from Dropout.tv: Parlor Room

item.title: [Parlor Room] Wavelength
item.description:
Paul, Jordan, Jess, Raph, & Demi play Wavelength, the party game where you read each other’s minds.

Duration: 31:28

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, paul robalino, jordan myrick, jessica ross, raphael chestang, demi adejuyigbe

item.title: [Parlor Room] Cash 'N Guns
item.description:
Vic, Talia, Angela, Jacob, Kimia, and Lou play Cash 'N Guns, the party game of bluff and gangsters.

Duration: 38:04

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, vic michaelis, talia tabin, angela giarratana, jacob wysocki, kimia behpoornia, lou wilson
